ddls:
CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the customer */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* Customer's first name */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Customer's last name */,
  "home_address" TEXT /* Customer's home address */,
  "email_address" TEXT /* Customer's email address */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Customer's phone number */,
  "status" INTEGER /* Current status of the customer account (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "credit_limit" TEXT /* Credit limit assigned to the customer */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Customer's date of birth */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Customer's gender */,
  "marital_status" TEXT /* Customer's marital status */,
  "annual_income" TEXT /* Customer's annual income */,
  "preferred_contact_method" TEXT /* Customer's preferred method of contact */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the customer record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the customer record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the order */,
  "customer_id" TEXT /* Reference to the customer who placed the order */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date when the order was placed */,
  "total_amount" TEXT /* Total amount of the order */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., completed, pending, canceled) */,
  "shipping_method" TEXT /* Shipping method used for the order */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Status of the payment (e.g., paid, unpaid, pending) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the order was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the order was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payments" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the payment */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the order for which the payment was made */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date of the payment */,
  "amount" TEXT /* Amount paid by the customer */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., credit card, cash, bank transfer) */,
  "transaction_id" TEXT /* Transaction ID associated with the payment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the payment record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the payment record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transaction_history" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the transaction */,
  "customer_id" TEXT /* Reference to the customer involved in the transaction */,
  "transaction_date" TEXT /* Date of the transaction */,
  "transaction_type" TEXT /* Type of transaction (e.g., purchase, refund) */,
  "amount" TEXT /* Amount involved in the transaction */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Order ID associated with the transaction */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the transaction record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the transaction record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transaction_history_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the product */,
  "price" TEXT /* Price of the product */,
  "stock_quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity in stock */,
  "brand" TEXT /* Brand of the product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the product */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the product record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the product record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the category record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the category record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "discounts" (
  "discount_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the discount */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product that the discount applies to */,
  "discount_percentage" TEXT /* Percentage off the product price */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the discount */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the discount */,
  "minimum_spend" TEXT /* Minimum spend required to apply the discount */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the discount record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the discount record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("discount_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_discounts_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the role record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the role record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for user login */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for authentication */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user's role */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* User's first name */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* User's last name */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the inventory record */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product in inventory */,
  "quantity_on_hand" INTEGER /* Current quantity of the product on hand */,
  "reorder_level" INTEGER /* Minimum quantity before reorder is triggered */,
  "last_stock_update" TEXT /* Date and time the last stock update was made */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the inventory record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the inventory record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the feedback */,
  "customer_id" TEXT /* Reference to the customer providing feedback */,
  "feedback_date" TEXT /* Date the feedback was provided */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the customer */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments or suggestions from the customer */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Order ID associated with the feedback */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the feedback record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the feedback record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_feedback_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shipping" (
  "shipping_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the shipping record */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the order being shipped */,
  "shipping_address" TEXT /* Address where the order is being shipped */,
  "shipping_date" TEXT /* Date the order was shipped */,
  "tracking_number" TEXT /* Tracking number for the shipment */,
  "shipping_method" TEXT /* Shipping method used for the order */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the shipping record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the shipping record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("shipping_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shipping_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "credit_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the credit report */,
  "customer_id" TEXT /* Reference to the customer */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date of the credit report */,
  "credit_score" INTEGER /* Credit score of the customer */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the credit report (e.g., good, poor) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the credit report was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the credit report was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_credit_reports_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "marketing_campaigns" (
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the campaign */,
  "campaign_name" TEXT /* Name of the marketing campaign */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the campaign */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the campaign */,
  "target_audience" TEXT /* Description of the target audience */,
  "budget" TEXT /* Budget allocated for the campaign */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the campaign record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the campaign record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("campaign_id")
)
